name: clean_pdf_rag
message: We have 25000 clean digital PDF pages and want chunks and embeddings for RAG search.

name: erp_ingestion
message: I want files recognized and relevant information ingested by my ERP system.

name: ocr_heavy
message: Most of our documents are scanned image PDFs and need OCR before anything else.

message: We need a real-time chatbot with low latency model serving.

name: sensitive_data
message: The documents include regulated medical customer data.
